def negative_recursive_walk_over_untrusted_input_lacks_depth_limit():
    rule_id = "recursive_walk_over_untrusted_input_lacks_depth_limit"
    family = "quality"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag recursion over caller-provided structures with no depth guard."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
